title: Tmesipteris tannensis
taxonomy: Tmesipteris tannensis is classified as a species of fern-like plant in the family Psilotaceae. This plant belongs to the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns and their allies. It is further grouped into the class Psilotopsida, an ancient group of vascular plants. The order Psilotales is another classification level, and within it, the family Psilotaceae is the most specific classification for Tmesipteris tannensis. This plant's classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
